title: [Bug]: CRASH ERROR in oceanbase::sql::ObSqlBitSet<96l, oceanbase::sql::ObExprInfoFlag, true>::has_member(long)
description: build `master` branch with sanity, client lost connection after executing a SQL.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
CREATE TABLE related_table (related_id INTEGER, test_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY (test_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT test_id FROM related_table WHERE related_id = 1);
key_bug_features: Client lost connection after executing a SQL
